description: A batch of fasteners from a supplier has failed incoming quality inspection. A quality engineer must manage the non-conformance.

nodes.task_description: Create a non-conformance report (NCR) detailing the failed inspection results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a complete NCR with all required details.

nodes.task_description: Notify the supplier of the non-conformance and request a root cause analysis and corrective action plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal notification to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Place the non-conforming parts in quarantine to prevent them from being used in production.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory system to place the parts on hold.
